_spawn_isolation_note: Loop body inline in main (Opus); Step-3 reviewer + HALT challenger spawned as independent subagents.
verdict: Good app, but not top-tier yet
verdict_explanation: With the render extracted last loop, all of search_boards' pure logic is tested. This loop adds the injectable fetch seam and exercises the orchestration offline (pagination, cross-page dedup, view-sort, play-only exclusion, min-views filter, early-stop). The search-orchestration half of F-008 is resolved; the SoundboardSnag download pipeline still calls urlopen directly and is the carried residual.

architecture_quality.proof: all of search_boards' pure logic is now extracted into tested Modules (BoardResult/ParsedBoard/_parse_board_html/_evaluate_filters/format+render helpers; render done commit 33d60cd). Residual: SoundboardSnag pipeline still has no fetch seam

state_management.proof: single-threaded; one writer per concern; immutable instance attrs

domain_modeling.proof: BoardResult + ParsedBoard; sounds_info deliberately a plain (id,title) 2-tuple (guardrail: don't force types)

data_flow.proof: named-field contracts; residual: main re-filters results (soundboard-snag.py:1607) although search_boards already returns only downloadable boards (F-007). The fetch seam is this loop's fix (scored next loop)

framework_idioms.proof: idiomatic stdlib; defensive sanitization; HTTPS; no secrets

concurrency.proof: no async/threading — synchronous CLI, no shared-mutable hazard
concurrency.residual_blocking_10: time.sleep pacing is intentional server etiquette, not a determinism hazard
concurrency.residual_rationale_or_backlog_ref: Tool is deliberately synchronous; no concurrency model to make safer. Permanent design carve-out.

simplicity.proof: per-board render extracted (commit 33d60cd); search_boards is an orchestration core (~615 lines) with all pure logic in small tested helpers

test_strategy.proof: RenderBoardLinesTests added (commit 33d60cd); 45 tests cover all pure logic. Residual at loop start: the orchestration was untested (addressed this loop via the fetch seam)

credibility.proof: every extracted Module is test-backed (commit 33d60cd); a senior reviewer reading in source order finds each Interface confirmed by a test; code remains honest

strengths: search_boards' pure logic is fully decomposed and tested; the function is now an orchestration core
The fetch seam follows the two-adapter rule (real _http_get + in-memory fake) and is behavior-preserving — production keeps the exact urlopen behavior
Synchronous design + defensive sanitization remain real strengths

findings.title: Network orchestration and the download pipeline are untestable (no injectable fetch seam)
findings.why_it_matters: The behavior-rich orchestration (pagination, cross-page dedup, early-stop, near-miss suggestions) and the SoundboardSnag download loop could only be exercised against the live site, so they had no regression guard.
findings.what_is_wrong: search_boards and SoundboardSnag called urlopen directly with no injection point. This loop adds a fetch seam to search_boards; SoundboardSnag still calls urlopen directly.
findings.leverage_impact: Without a seam, the orchestration cannot be verified offline.
findings.locality_impact: A regression in pagination/early-stop would only surface against the live site.
findings.why_weakens_submission: The remaining test-strategy/architecture ceiling. The fetch seam (real _http_get + in-memory fake) satisfies the two-adapter rule and unlocks deterministic orchestration tests; the SoundboardSnag pipeline still needs the same treatment.
findings.minimal_correction_path: This loop: add module-level _http_get(url) default and an injectable fetch parameter on search_boards; route the search-page and board-page reads through it; test pagination/dedup/early-stop/view-sort/play-only/min-views offline. Next loop: give SoundboardSnag the same fetcher injection and test the consecutive-failure abort.

findings.title: main re-filters search results that are already downloadable-only
findings.why_it_matters: A redundant filter implies search_boards might return play-only boards, which it does not; the duplication is mildly misleading.
findings.what_is_wrong: main computes downloadable_boards = [r for r in results if r.has_downloads], but search_boards already returns only has_downloads boards.
evidence: soundboard-snag.py: search_boards returns results filtered by has_downloads
findings.leverage_impact: None — the filter is a no-op.
findings.locality_impact: Minor: a reader may wonder whether search_boards can return play-only boards.
findings.why_weakens_submission: Redundant defensive code is a small data-flow/simplicity deduction.
findings.minimal_correction_path: Replace the re-filter with downloadable_boards = results (or iterate results directly), with a comment that search_boards already guarantees has_downloads.

simplification_check.structurally_necessary: The fetch seam passes the Unified Seam Policy two-adapter rule: a real adapter (_http_get, exact urlopen behavior) plus an in-memory fake used by the orchestration tests. It is the only way to verify pagination/dedup/early-stop offline (friction proven: these had no test).
simplification_check.helpful_simplification: The two network reads in search_boards collapse to fetch(url) calls.
simplification_check.should_not_be_done: Do not build an HTTP client class hierarchy or an adapter registry; a single injected function is the honest seam. Do not change the default behavior (production still uses _http_get).
simplification_check.tests_after_fix: test_soundboard_snag.py gains SearchBoardsOrchestrationTests (sort-by-views, play-only exclusion, pagination across pages, min-views filter, early-stop) driving search_boards with an in-memory fetcher and time.sleep patched out.

backlog.title: Add an injectable fetch seam and test the search orchestration offline (F-008)
backlog.why_it_matters: The remaining test-strategy/architecture ceiling; unlocks deterministic orchestration tests.

backlog.title: Give SoundboardSnag the same fetcher injection and test the failure-abort (F-008 residual)
backlog.why_it_matters: Completes the testability seam for the download pipeline.

backlog.title: Remove the redundant downloadable re-filter in main (F-007)
backlog.why_it_matters: Subtractive; clarifies search_boards already guarantees downloadable-only.

deepening_candidates.source_friction_proven: Finding F-008 residual — SoundboardSnag.snag's consecutive-failure abort and play-only detection are untested
deepening_candidates.why_shallow_or_misplaced: _fetch_page and _snag_sound call urlopen directly with no injection point.
deepening_candidates.behavior_to_move_behind_interface: Page fetch (and optionally track download) behind an injectable fetcher defaulting to the real network.
deepening_candidates.test_surface_after_change: tests drive SoundboardSnag.snag with a fake fetcher; assert the 2-consecutive-failure abort and play-only RuntimeError.
deepening_candidates.smallest_first_step: Add a fetcher parameter to SoundboardSnag.__init__ defaulting to _http_get; route _fetch_page through it.
deepening_candidates.what_not_to_do: Do not abstract file writes behind a seam this round; focus on the page fetch.

builder_notes.pattern: Inject a fetch function to make network orchestration testable
builder_notes.how_to_recognize: The most behavior-rich code calls urlopen/requests directly and has no tests.
builder_notes.smallest_coding_rule: Add a default real fetcher and an optional fetch parameter; route reads through it; tests pass an in-memory fake. Two adapters justify the seam.
builder_notes.stack_example: Python: search_boards(fetch=_http_get) with a dict-backed fake fetcher in tests.

builder_notes.pattern: Keep the seam a function, not a class hierarchy
builder_notes.how_to_recognize: The temptation is an HTTPClient interface with adapters.
builder_notes.smallest_coding_rule: A single injected callable is enough for one production impl plus a test fake; do not add ceremony.

builder_notes.pattern: Patch out real delays in orchestration tests
builder_notes.how_to_recognize: The code under test calls time.sleep between requests.
builder_notes.smallest_coding_rule: mock.patch('time.sleep') so the test runs instantly without changing production timing.

narrative: Place — a good app, now with its orchestration testable. The fetch seam is the right shape: a single injected function with a real default and an in-memory test fake, satisfying the two-adapter rule and adding deterministic tests for pagination, dedup, view-sort, play-only exclusion, min-views filtering and early-stop. F-008's search half is resolved; the SoundboardSnag download pipeline is the named carried residual. Ownership and concurrency stay trustworthy, and the seam added no class ceremony — exactly the restraint the rubric rewards.

loop_result.what_changed: Added a module-level _http_get(url) default fetcher and an injectable `fetch` parameter on search_boards; routed the search-page and board-page reads through it (production passes _http_get, preserving the exact urlopen behavior). Added SearchBoardsOrchestrationTests (5 tests) that drive search_boards with an in-memory fake fetcher and time.sleep patched out, asserting view-sort ordering, play-only exclusion, pagination across pages, min-views filtering, and early-stop at max_results.
loop_result.evidence_change_is_honest: python3 -m py_compile passes; python3 -m unittest test_soundboard_snag runs 50 tests, all OK (45 prior + 5 new orchestration); --help exits 0; _http_get reproduces the inline Request/urlopen/decode and raises the same HTTPError/URLError so the existing try/except handling is unchanged; grep confirms no direct urlopen remains in the search_boards body (the date-scan still uses _fetch_last_modified_detailed, out of scope this loop).

implementation_review.reason: The fetch seam is fully in place: _http_get reproduces the exact Request/urlopen/decode chain and propagates HTTPError/URLError; search_boards defaults fetch to _http_get; both network reads replaced; no urlopen remains in the search_boards body; two real adapters exist (_http_get + a behavior-faithful dict-backed test fake); five orchestration tests assert sort, play-only exclusion, pagination, min-views, and early-stop (fetch-avoidance verified); time.sleep patched; exception handlers structurally unchanged.
